medical_history.chief_complaint: weakness in both ankles and toes that had been progressing since birth
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Neurological examination revealed decreased motor power of MRC Grade 1/5 and sensory impairment in both ankles and toes. A nerve conduction study revealed no evidence of peripheral neuropathy. Magnetic resonance imaging of the whole spine showed a large cystic and solid mass that extended from the midthoracic to sacral levels, compressing the spinal cord.

physical_examination.specialty_examination: Neurological examination revealed decreased motor power of MRC Grade 1/5 and sensory impairment in both ankles and toes.
